item.name: Tentacle Thresher
item.description:
Displaying an almost exclusive predilection for preying on octopodes, this wavekin shows that even nature's deadliest predators can be picky eaters.

[Suitable for printing on extra large canvases.]

fish.guide: Although this species of shark could have its pick of the ocean's bounty, it seems strangely fixated on hunting octopodes. Only in extreme states of hunger has a specimen been observed eating anything else, and even then, only enough to last until the next tentacled morsel comes along.
